$comment: Per-project causal/dependency graph. nodes=modules, edges=[cause,effect] where cause is imported-by effect. invariants=health rules the L4 verifier checks BEFORE declaring a milestone done. Seeded from the D4 design (design/*); the naive_baseline.* nodes are the D3 baseline that the built system must beat. Regenerate the skeleton with tools/graphizer.mjs; invariants added by hand.

invariants.I1_tenant_isolation: No repository method accepts tenant_id as a parameter — tenant is a constructor argument, bound once. Every SQL read and write is scoped by that constructor-bound tenant_id. Consequence checked by the verifier: 0 cross-tenant rows in any retrieval result on the D3 fixed set. Closes F10.
invariants.I2_pii_hard_gate: The PII gate is a hard admission precondition. No memory row is persisted whose candidate text trips the deterministic PII detector; blocked content leaves zero trace (no row, no embedding, no log payload). Closes F11.
invariants.I3_validity_filter: The ranker only ever orders currently-valid facts (valid_to IS NULL AND invalidated_at IS NULL). Superseded facts are invalidated on the WRITE path; a stale fact can never out-rank its successor because it is never a candidate. Closes F4; implements ADR-001.
invariants.I4_budget_and_abstain: Injected context never exceeds TOKEN_BUDGET (2000). When no candidate clears the abstain threshold, the system abstains (returns nothing) rather than padding the top-k with filler. Closes F8.
invariants.I5_deletion_cascade: A delete removes the fact and its embedding row in a single transaction (ON DELETE CASCADE); no derived projection outlives its source. Collapses the F9 consistency window to a transaction (ADR-005).
invariants.I6_domain_purity: Domain modules (repository, ranking, admission, retrieval) import no web framework and no concrete DB driver directly — storage detail (sqlite3 today, Postgres+pgvector in prod per ADR-005) sits behind mnemo.store. Dependency direction is inward; zero cycles.
invariants.I7_deletion_is_real: [D6/M4] A deletion removes the fact from source storage AND every retrieval path in one transaction; the embedding projection cascades. The deletion_request row records requested_at/completed_at so the F9 consistency window is MEASURED, not hoped for. Delete-then-requery must return nothing.
invariants.I8_consolidation_cites_never_replaces: [D6/M4] A rollup memory CITES its sources via consolidation_edge and never deletes or invalidates them: every source stays independently retrievable and the rollup is re-derivable from them. Guards F5 (loss on summarisation) and F6 (drift). Corollary: an incorrectly invalidated fact is recoverable from history (ADR-001 residual).
invariants.I9_audit_fails_closed: [D6/M5] Every retrieval writes exactly one access_log row before results are returned; if the audit write fails, the read fails closed (no result without a log row) — threat R5. Every decision (candidates, per-signal scores, budget drops, PII suppressions, final set) is reconstructable from the trace for its request_id (C9).

freeze_boundary: $comment: globs the driver may edit; everything else is off-limits without explicit user request
